name: Ferko Md
description_short: Ferko Md Federal Credit Union is a small, NCUA-insured credit union based in Frederick, Maryland, offering savings accounts, CDs, mortgages, and loans to members.
description_long:
Ferko Md Federal Credit Union was established in 1955 and operates as a federally chartered, NCUA-insured financial institution headquartered in Frederick, Maryland (ZIP 21702). With approximately $28.03 million in assets, $22.54 million in deposits, and $11.70 million in loans outstanding, it is a small community-focused credit union serving a local membership base. The credit union maintains a traditional brick-and-mortar structure with multiple branch locations available to members in the Frederick area.

Ferko Md offers a standard suite of consumer banking products including savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs) with terms ranging from 1 to 5 years, mortgage products (both 30-year and 15-year fixed options), home equity lines of credit (HELOCs), auto loans, and personal loans. As a credit union, membership is required to access these products. The institution provides FDIC-equivalent protection through NCUA insurance on deposits up to $250,000 per member.

As a small, locally-rooted credit union, Ferko Md distinguishes itself through personalized member service and community ties dating back to 1955. The institution maintains physical branch locations, which can provide face-to-face banking services unavailable at online-only banks. Credit unions typically offer competitive rates to members and operate on a not-for-profit basis, theoretically returning profits to members rather than shareholders.

A significant limitation is data availability: the website explicitly states "We do not yet have rates for Ferko Md" for either deposit or loan products as of April 2026, making current rate comparisons impossible. Potential members cannot easily compare Ferko Md's actual rates against competitors online and must contact the institution directly. Additionally, as a small institution, it likely lacks the product breadth and digital banking capabilities of larger banks or credit unions. Geographic service is limited to the Frederick, Maryland area.
pros: NCUA federally insured institution providing deposit protection up to $250,000
Established 1955 with 70+ years of operating history and community presence
Offers full banking suite: savings, CDs, mortgages, HELOCs, auto loans, and personal loans
Multiple physical branch locations for in-person banking services
Not-for-profit credit union structure returns profits to members
Competitive mortgage rates listed (4.91% for 30-year, 4.39% for 15-year)
Low HELOC rate option at 0.99% APR
cons: Current rates not available online as of April 2026—must contact institution directly for deposit and loan rate quotes
Small institution ($28M in assets) with limited product breadth compared to larger credit unions and banks
Membership restricted to Frederick, Maryland area; no indication of online account opening or remote services
No evidence of modern digital banking features, mobile apps, or online-only product offerings
Limited geographic accessibility makes it unsuitable for non-local consumers
best_for: Frederick, Maryland residents seeking personal banking relationships with a community credit union
Members prioritizing NCUA insurance protection and not-for-profit governance structure
Borrowers in the Frederick area seeking mortgage or auto loans with local service
Long-term savers and CD investors comfortable calling for rate quotes rather than comparing online
diagnosis: Ferko Md Federal Credit Union is best suited for Frederick, Maryland residents seeking traditional community banking with NCUA-backed protection and local branch access. The primary caveat is severe data transparency: current rates are unavailable online, requiring direct contact with the institution, and the small asset base limits product sophistication compared to regional and national credit unions.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Ferko MD Federal Credit Union offers savings accounts, CDs, mortgages, and loans to members in Frederick, Maryland.
